element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Primary sustained damage tool throughout game
High-damage alternative to cannon; requires lock-on delay
Front and rear attacks; teach player directional threat awareness
Optional objectives; reward exploration and targeting flexibility
Sustained combat; teaches pattern recognition and persistence
Triggers third-person perspective shift; forces defensive evasion gameplay
Mirror-match opponent with superior stats; culmination of all learned skills

typical_relief_triggers: Gaining time bonus advancement to next stage
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Wave-based intensity with escalating pressure; player controls engagement through target selection, creating variable tension within structured mission flow

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Player choice of target selection (ships vs fighters vs tanks vs bosses) creates implicit optional engagement zones

difficulty_curve.early_game: Tutorial-like introduction of cannon and missile weapons; basic enemy fighters from front only; optional ground targets teach targeting mechanics
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Simultaneous front and rear attacks; boss encounters introduce pattern recognition; missile lock-on mechanic forces perspective and tactical shifts
difficulty_curve.late_game: Sustained boss battles requiring sustained damage output and evasion skill; final enemy ace represents skill ceiling with enhanced durability and strength
notable_spikes: First boss appearance (War Balloon) - introduces dramatic durability requirement
Simultaneous front/rear attack waves - increased spatial awareness demand
Final boss (Enemy Ace) - mirror-match with superior stats; culmination spike

notable_level_patterns.description: Each stage is structured as a mission with specific objectives. Player must achieve goals to earn time bonus and advance to next stage. Time pressure creates continuous tension throughout
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Generic structure applies to all stages

notable_level_patterns.description: Game alternates between first-person combat view and third-person behind-plane view when enemy missile lock-on occurs, forcing tactical evasion gameplay within structured combat space
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Occurs during enemy missile attacks mid-game onward

notable_level_patterns.description: Named boss encounters (War Balloon, Bomber, Enemy Ace) represent stage climaxes with increasing durability and attack patterns; require sustained focus and skill mastery
